This is better than gorilla tag. I give it 4 stars cuz sometimes, i can't load into the game. I EVEN MET THE OWNER!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

When I tried to take off cosmetics and buy them BUY AT RISK
My friend is a admin so I have to down vote
Best game ever the mods the playas all good
But it needs a system where you can buy stuff from a phone.

reviews.review_title: Love the game but needs friending system
reviews.review_description:
Love the game and stuff, a little bouncy and could use a bit more tweaking. 

Met some really nice people who wanted to friend me. I tried to friend them but the name wasn’t quite correct so i couldn’t find them, then they tried my name but the. Suddenly everyone disappeared at some point. I don’t think he found me and that really bothers me cuz im sure it would’ve been nice to be friends.

Add a friending system in the game. Something the devs should’ve thought of when they created the game. From the start. Everyone knows a multiplayer game needs a friending system. Also typing a nickname sucks. When typing the letters you type are often multiple letters instead of 1

A day after meeting the person i tried to add i went on the game again in the hopes of finding them again. Unfortunately no luck, but i did come across some other people.
One of them asked me how old i was and i told him and then he started bullying me and calling me a predator who is trying to meet with an 11 year old girl. For the record. I didn’t even know if any were a girl or a boy. I was playing by myself.
An 11 year old shouldn’t even be om VR cuz its for 13+ and also i didn’t want to meet anyone, i was in that server before anyone else was and they suddenly appeared as well as, i was building a house and the bully was ruining it which wasn’t much of a problem to me other than the bullying. Make a report button somewhere because its very hard to report someone while in game. I still don’t know how to report someone.

Please make your game better, thank you 🙏🏽

reviews.review_title: Most fun I've ever had in VR
reviews.review_description: Me and my friends hopped on the game yesterday and the amount of things you can do plus the bouncy movement just makes it amazing!

This game is absolutely amazing but no one plays it it’s a new game so I understand the quality of the game is amazing but the discord doesn’t work so but it’s very good and me and my friend are gonna make a vid he has 1k subs and we were gonna add the owner on discord but it doesn’t work so we have to write it on here but can we get mod so we can check out everything my discord name is joe9650529. HOPE YOUR GAME WORKS OUT😄😁
so the game is a remake of the original oragu witch has the same name but without vr added
I recorded a movie on this game and it looked so good! Best game on VR!
This game is way too underrated!! Where’s everyone at??
I remember playing this game back in 2023, it was so fun with the bouncy movement. Came back to this game 2 years later and it has kept the same joy i once had, if not more!

This game is good the physics to the climbing it’s underrated but it’s the best fan game I got it today and it’s sick to see how I never knew this existed best climbing physics but please add horror mode
PLEASE KEEP UP THE GOOD WORK!
